body:
Hi Armaan,

Confirming your final-round onsite at Datadog NYC on Tuesday, May 6:

- 9:30 AM — Check-in, Reception
- 10:00 AM — Coding interview (Sarah W.)
- 11:15 AM — Systems design (Marcus T.)
- 12:30 PM — Lunch with team
- 2:00 PM — Behavioral & values (Elena R.)
- 3:15 PM — Hiring manager (Daniel K.)

Please bring a photo ID for building security. Dress is casual. Reach out to me directly with any last-minute questions.

Good luck!
Kiera Johnson
Coordinator, Datadog University Recruiting
subject: Final round — Tuesday 5/6 agenda
